mode.label: Backend mode
mode.help: Use "cli" to run pmem locally (recommended for individuals; no server). Use "http" for powermem-server (teams / enterprise). Default: cli

baseUrl.label: PowerMem API URL
baseUrl.help: Required when mode is http. Base URL of PowerMem HTTP API (no /api/v1). Start server with: powermem-server --port 8000

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional; required if PowerMem server has authentication enabled (http mode only)

httpApiVersion.label: HTTP API version
httpApiVersion.help: HTTP mode: v1 (default) or v2. v2 enables per-request config and agent memory APIs.

requestTimeoutMs.label: Request timeout (ms)
requestTimeoutMs.help: Abort HTTP/CLI requests after this many milliseconds (0 = no timeout)

requestConfig.label: Request config (v2)
requestConfig.help: HTTP v2 only: per-request PowerMem config object (same shape as auto_config()).

envFile.label: Env file path
envFile.help: CLI mode: path to PowerMem .env (default ~/.openclaw/powermem/powermem.env if you use install.sh -y). Optional; pmem can discover .env if omitted

pmemPath.label: pmem binary path
pmemPath.help: CLI mode: bundled (default) or auto = npm powermem next to this plugin if installed, else pmem on PATH; or absolute path / command name (e.g. Python venv pmem)

recallLimit.label: Recall limit
recallLimit.help: Max memories to return in recall / inject in auto-recall (1–100)

recallScoreThreshold.label: Recall score threshold
recallScoreThreshold.help: Min score (0–1); memories below are filtered out

walCapture.label: WAL Capture
walCapture.help: Incrementally capture key facts during conversations to prevent loss on crash/compaction

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

autoExperience.label: Auto-Experience
autoExperience.help: Automatically store session experiences at agent_end

experienceRecall.label: Experience Recall
experienceRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant experiences into context

inferOnAdd.label: Infer on Add
inferOnAdd.help: Use PowerMem intelligent extraction when adding (infer=true)

dualWrite.label: Dual write (HTTP + SQLite)
dualWrite.help: When enabled, write to remote HTTP and local sqlite for failover and resync.

localDbPath.label: Local sqlite path
localDbPath.help: Local sqlite file path for dual-write. Default: <stateDir>/powermem/local-memories.sqlite

localUserId.label: Local User ID
localUserId.help: Override user_id for local sqlite storage (dual-write)

localAgentId.label: Local Agent ID
localAgentId.help: Override agent_id for local sqlite storage (dual-write)

syncOnResume.label: Sync pending writes
syncOnResume.help: When remote recovers, sync local pending writes (default true)

syncBatchSize.label: Sync batch size
syncBatchSize.help: Max pending writes per sync attempt

syncBaseDelayMs.label: Sync base delay (ms)
syncBaseDelayMs.help: Base backoff delay after a failed sync

syncMaxRetries.label: Sync max retries
syncMaxRetries.help: Skip items after this many failed retries (0 = unlimited)

localVector.label: Local vector search
localVector.help: Optional local vector fallback for dual-write (OpenAI/Ollama compatible embeddings + sqlite-vec).

useOpenClawModel.label: Use OpenClaw LLM for PowerMem
useOpenClawModel.help: When true (default), inject LLM/embedding from OpenClaw agents.defaults.model into pmem (overrides powermem .env for those keys). SQLite defaults under OpenClaw state dir when no .env.
